experiment: EgoMem Cycle 2 / H2 - real-data out-of-view recall
gate: 14/14 scenes passed projection validation (box centroids project in-image at positive depth, sane partial-visibility); OBB centroid units = cm (/100 -> m), same world frame as trajectory (verified)
notes: Read-heads + arms reused verbatim from the shipped library. Oracle data association (object id + 3D box from annotations); projection convention auto-selected per scene by max in-image visibility (see limitations). Raw output: stdout_arkit.log
